div.div: Legend: solid = Postgres table · * = implied backend table · dashed = view / transient / config · † = transient · ‡ = per-society config. Full fields + invariants on the group pages; edges here are the load-bearing cross-group links only.

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 230px; height: 1px; padding-top: 475px; margin-left: 1506px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Explicit NON-entities: no Society table, no society_id, no tenancy (single society per deployment). 'defaulter' derived at read time, never stored. The four books are views over ONE append-only journal. Vendors are records, not users. No Razorpay webhook/settlement entity — outcome is Payment + ledger postings.
